title: Replace Internet Identity admin auth with hardcoded password access control

requirements.text: Replace the Internet Identity authentication requirement on the Admin Panel (/admin route) with a simple hardcoded password-based access control. When a user navigates to /admin, display a password prompt screen. If the correct hardcoded password is entered, grant access to the admin panel. If the password is incorrect, show an error and keep the user on the prompt screen. Store the admin session state in React component state or sessionStorage so the user is not re-prompted on page navigation within the same session.

quotes: like a simple password or a hardcoded admin role
1. (like a simple password or a hardcoded admin role) only

acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to /admin no longer triggers Internet Identity login
A password prompt UI is shown when accessing /admin without an active admin session
Entering the correct hardcoded password grants access to the admin panel tabs (Books and Orders)
Entering an incorrect password shows a visible error message and does not grant access
Admin session persists for the duration of the browser session (sessionStorage or React state) so the user is not re-prompted unnecessarily
The rest of the application (catalog, checkout, order history, cart) is unaffected

requirements.text: Remove the admin role check based on Internet Identity principal from the AdminPanelPage. The access control logic should rely solely on the hardcoded password session. The AccessDeniedScreen component may still be used if the password has not been entered, but it should not reference Internet Identity login.

quotes: like a simple password or a hardcoded admin role

acceptanceCriteria: AdminPanelPage no longer calls any Internet Identity or principal-based admin role check
The admin panel is accessible purely by entering the correct hardcoded password
No Internet Identity login prompt appears when accessing /admin

constraints: Only the admin panel access control should be changed — do not modify authentication on any other part of the app
Do not remove Internet Identity hooks or provider from the rest of the application
Do not modify immutable frontend paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Removing Internet Identity from the entire application
Building a dynamic admin user management system
Storing admin credentials in the backend or any database
Adding role-based access control beyond a single hardcoded admin password
